Class FreljordianYeti

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.Objective
nongui.listofobjective.FreljordianYeti
public class FreljordianYeti extends Objective
Represents the "Freljordian Yeti" Objective Card.

A massive, relentless beast from the Howling Abyss. Requirement: Requires at least 1 Hero and 1 Marksman. Prize: Each time you DRAW an Item card, you may play it immediately. Punishment: DISCARD 2 cards.

  • Constructor Summary
